source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Relaxed commerce English UI with elegant coastal headings, clear sans body text, legible price and inventory figures, and Japanese typography guidance for concise checkout labels, product data, and support states.
layout: Precise 8px grids, 8px radii, water-ripple dividers, palm-shadow texture bands, sea-glass focus rings, soft coastal shadows, product cards, checkout summaries, search commands, compact dashboards, and low-pressure navigation.

prompts.label: Transparent Lagoon motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout chroma-key source
Primary request: Create a compact isolated tropical lagoon shallows motif on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal.
Subject: a self-contained lagoon shallows vignette: clear turquoise shallow water with gentle ripples over white sand, a soft sandbar edge, a few small palm frond silhouettes and palm leaf shadows as part of the cutout, subtle coral-sand texture, no horizon and no full landscape background.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; organic rounded island-like shape; do not crop the subject; no cast shadow outside the motif.
Lighting/mood: clean bright coastal daylight, relaxed tropical commerce system feel, natural material detail, crisp edges for cutout extraction.
Transparent workflow: place only the lagoon motif on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no people, no boats, no buildings, no decorative background, no second subject.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for Lagoon, derived from tropical lagoon shallows: turquoise clear water, white sand, palm shade, relaxed commerce system.
Canvas: wide 16:9 design board, 4K-class source, crisp UI mockup, large readable labels.
System identity: Lagoon; category landscape; context tropical coast; motif lagoon shallows; feel relaxed commerce system for browsing, product cards, checkout, dashboards, bookings, and inventory.
Visual language: airy white-sand surfaces, translucent turquoise panels, sea-glass accents, palm-shadow texture, shallow-water ripple dividers, calm commerce controls, precise grid, 8px component radius, soft coastal shadows.
Required visible sections: title "Lagoon", motif story, palette swatches named Turquoise Water, White Sand, Palm, Sea Glass, Coral Shell, Deep Channel; typography for English and Japanese UI; buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, product card, price tag, cart summary, search command, navigation, dashboard metrics, table, chart, empty/error/loading states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture, token examples, generated asset examples.
Typography: readable multilingual product UI guidance with English and Japanese examples, short labels only.
Color constraints: use motif-derived turquoise water, white sand, palm green, shell neutrals, and deeper lagoon teal for contrast; avoid unrelated purple/blue gradients and saturated accent clutter.
Composition: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system board, organized into clear full-width grid zones, not a landing page, no tiny dense token tables.
Text constraints: short readable UI labels, no random brand names, no watermark.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for Lagoon. It must feel like the same relaxed tropical-commerce system translated to dark mode, derived from lagoon shallows: turquoise water, white sand highlights, palm shade, and deep channel teal.
Canvas: wide 16:9 design board, 4K-class source, crisp UI mockup, large readable labels.
System identity: Lagoon; category landscape; context tropical coast; motif lagoon shallows; feel relaxed commerce system for browsing, product cards, checkout, dashboards, bookings, and inventory.
Visual language: deep channel teal background, moonlit turquoise accents, warm shell-white text, muted palm green surfaces, subtle water-ripple and palm-shadow textures, calm commerce controls, precise grid, 8px component radius, soft low-contrast coastal shadows.
Required visible sections: title "Lagoon", label "Dark Mode", palette swatches named Deep Channel, Night Water, Sea Glass, Moon Sand, Palm Shade, Coral Shell; typography for English and Japanese UI; buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, product card, price tag, cart summary, search command, navigation, dashboard metrics, table, chart, empty/error/loading states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture, token examples, generated asset examples.
Typography: readable multilingual product UI guidance with English and Japanese examples, short labels only.
Color constraints: preserve motif-derived turquoise, white sand, palm green, shell neutrals, and deep lagoon teal; no neon colors, no pure black slab background, no unrelated purple gradients.
Composition: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system board, organized into clear full-width grid zones, not a landing page, no tiny dense token tables.
Text constraints: short readable UI labels, no random brand names, no watermark.
